reason: Project spec index (edit/add more spec files).
CAFF vs clowder-ai parallel dispatch research and phased v1 design.

summary: Implemented CAFF agent parallel dispatch v1: explicit single @Agent messages now side-dispatch through per-agent slot registry and slot-aware queue, side-lane user messages persist durable dispatch metadata, runtime/SSE expose activeAgentSlots plus agentSlotQueueDepths, UI busy/stop/timeline state follows both main and side lanes, and queued side runs rehydrate snapshot message content on slot grant.
